productTitle: Ubiquiti Power TransPort Cable Extender Kit
name: Ubiquiti Power TransPort Cable Extender Kit
title: Ubiquiti Power TransPort Cable Extender Kit
short_description: Extender kit for Power TransPort cable
description: Extender kit for Power TransPort cable

detailed_description.heading: General Description
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-PT-Ext Power TransPort Cable Extender Kit is an advanced solution specifically designed for UISP Power TransPort cables ( UACC-Cable-PT) to enhance the deployment flexibility of your network installations by extending Power over Ethernet (PoE) connections. This kit is particularly suitable for challenging outdoor environments or large-scale network configurations where device placement far from power sources is necessary.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
IPX6-rated weather and UV resistance
Pole and wall-mountable
Compatible with UISP Power TransPort cables

detailed_description.heading: Material and Durability
detailed_description.text: Constructed from UV-stabilized polycarbonate, the UACC-Cable-PT-Ext extender kit is designed for durability and longevity. This material provides exceptional resistance to weathering, UV degradation, and environmental impacts, ensuring that the kit remains operational in harsh conditions. The enclosure is also designed with IPX6-rated weatherproofing, offering high levels of protection against heavy rain and strong water jets, making it ideal for outdoor use. The kit features a waterproof interface that makes it especially suited for extending UISP Power TransPort cables in outdoor or humid environments. This functionality ensures reliable performance across various installation scenarios, including those exposed to extreme weather conditions. It can operate in ambient temperatures ranging from -40 to 80° C (-40 to 176° F).

detailed_description.heading: Mounting and Applications
detailed_description.text: The kit includes components that can be mounted on poles ranging from 35 to 60 mm (1.38 to 2.36 inches) in diameter, providing versatility in mounting options and ease of installation across different structures. This feature is particularly beneficial for setting up extended network configurations in expansive areas. The kit is perfect for use in large buildings, outdoor spaces, or situations where network devices such as cameras and access points need to be powered and connected over significant distances. It is ideal for deployments in areas such as campuses, industrial zones, and outdoor venues.
